title: IRA

hero.title: About IRA Estates
hero.sub: A company built on restraint, craft, and a deep respect for place.

story.heading:
Built from a belief
that less is more.
paragraphs: IRA Estates was founded by people who had spent years watching the luxury residential market default to excess — more square footage, more ornamentation, more spectacle. The question they kept asking was: what would it look like to build the opposite?

The answer became IRA Estates. A company committed to developing a small number of exceptional residences in India's finest locations — not many, and not fast, but each one considered in every detail from the ground up.

Our first project is in Benaulim, South Goa: eight private pool villas on a sheltered coastal site, two minutes from the beach. Our second is coming to the pine ridges of Kasauli, Himachal Pradesh. Both are shaped by the same conviction — that the finest home is the one that knows exactly where it is.

intro.label: Our Founders
intro.heading:
Born from vision.
Built with attention.
intro.body:
IRA Estates was never just a company — it was a calling. Born from the vision of two people who believed that luxury should be quiet, that craft should be considered, and that the finest home is the one that knows exactly where it is.

Together, they are not merely builders — they are pathfinders of a quieter kind of luxury.

people.name: Co-Founder Name
people.bio: Add your co-founder's story here — their expertise, design philosophy, and what they bring to every IRA Estates project. This content is managed from data/content.json.

items.name: Place First
items.desc: Every IRA residence is designed from its site outward. The landscape, the light, the material vernacular of the region — these are not backdrop. They are the brief.

items.name: Craft Over Scale
items.desc: We build fewer homes than we could. This is intentional. Smaller volumes allow for the level of attention that distinguishes a great house from an adequate one.

items.name: Built to Last
items.desc: We choose materials and systems that age well — stone, concrete, hardwood — over surfaces that look perfect on day one and tired by year five. We build for decades, not for the launch brochure.

quote.text:
"The finest home is not the largest or the most ornamented.
It is the one that knows where it is."

hero.title: Projects
hero.sub: A small portfolio of exceptional residences, built with intention in India's finest locations.

items.name:
IRA Estates
Benaulim, South Goa
items.description: Eight exclusive 4BHK private pool villas set on a sheltered coastal site two minutes from Benaulim beach. Designed to disappear into the landscape while providing every comfort of a considered luxury residence.

items.name:
IRA Kasauli
Himachal Pradesh
items.description: Perched at 6,000 ft in the pine-covered ridges above Chandigarh, IRA's next residence is designed to disappear into the treeline — and leave nothing behind but stillness.
